title: High Pressure Protection Lockout Logic
summary: High pressure switch trips lock out the system after 3 trips within 2 hours (excluding during defrost). Manual reset required.
evidence_quote: 从开关第一次跳开计时，在 2小时内开关跳开次数累计 3次《除霜时不计入，除霜 高压跳时不报警系统退出除霜、但压缩机停止运行，等高压开关闭合≥ 5分钟自动复位，之后重新判断是否需要加载 》，控制板默认系统存在故障，便高压报警锁定

title: Low Pressure Protection Lockout Logic
summary: Low pressure switch trips lock out the system after 3 trips within 2 hours (excluding during defrost). Manual reset required.
evidence_quote: 从开关第一次跳开计时，在 2小时内开关跳开次数累计 3次（除霜时不计入） ，便低压报警锁定；否则，计数器清零重新计数。有故障的压缩机要人工故障复位后，才能重新启动。

title: Temperature Difference Protection (Cooling)
summary: In cooling mode, if unit inlet/outlet water temperature difference is ≥9°C or ≤1°C for 120 seconds, compressor and fan stop with alarm.
evidence_quote: 在制冷模式下，压缩机启动后当连续 120秒钟检测到单元进出水的温度差≥ 9℃或≦1℃时

title: Temperature Difference Protection (Heating)
summary: In heating mode, if unit outlet/return water temperature difference is ≥9°C or ≤1°C for 120 seconds, compressor and fan stop with alarm.
evidence_quote: 在制热模式下，压缩机启动后当连续 120秒钟检测到单元出回水的温度差≥ 9℃或≦1℃时

title: High/Low Water Temperature Protection
summary: Cooling: system outlet water ≤5°C triggers shutdown, auto-reset at ≥11°C. Heating: system outlet water ≥50°C triggers shutdown, auto-reset at <40°C.
evidence_quote: 制冷时系统出水温度≤ 5℃时将进入停机保护状态，温度上升到 ≥11℃自动复位；冬季制热水温度≥ 50℃时将进入停机保护状态， 温度降到＜ 40℃自动复位

title: Fin Temperature High Protection (Cooling)
summary: In cooling mode, if fin temperature exceeds 65°C, compressor stops. Auto-reset when temperature drops to 50°C or below.
evidence_quote: 制冷模式下若翅片温度超过 65℃，压缩机停，温度降到 50℃或以下自动复位。

title: Water Flow Protection
summary: Water flow switch must be closed 30 seconds after pump start. If switch opens during operation, pump and unit stop immediately, requiring manual restart.
evidence_quote: 当机组在投入运行，水泵启动 30秒后检测水流保护开关输入状态，在水泵运行过程中若发生 断水保护开关动作（开路） ，则立即停止水泵及机组的工作，控制器锁定需要手动重新开机才能恢复运行。

title: External Interlock Protection
summary: External interlock input (e.g., pump interlock) must be closed. If it opens during operation (except manual mode), unit stops and requires manual restart.
evidence_quote: 当机组在任何模式 （手动模式除外） 下运行，若发生外部连锁故障（开路） ，则停止运行，需要手动重新开机才 能恢复运行。

title: Compressor Minimum Run Time for Temperature Control Shutdown
summary: During normal operation, compressor must run for at least the set minimum time before a temperature control shutdown can occur.

structured_payload.parameter_name: Minimum run time for temp control shutdown

evidence_quote: 正常运转状态下温控停机时压缩机最少运转设定时间， 才能停机

title: Oil Pre-Heating Requirement
summary: When ambient temperature is below 20°C, compressor start is delayed 240 minutes after power-on for oil heating.
evidence_quote: 环境温度底于 20℃时，系统初始上电到压缩机启动延迟 240分钟（可设定） ，等待压缩机油加热。

title: Fan Coil Interlock Control
summary: If the remote control switch (line control) opens for 16 seconds, the unit stops and enters standby. It auto-starts when the switch closes.
evidence_quote: 在控制器工作在制冷、制热或自动模式时，在主控制器开机的情况下，如线控开关断开 16秒，则机组停机进入待机状态，闭合后自动进入运行状态。

title: Cooling Mode Start Sequence
summary: Cooling start sequence: 1. Start water pump. 2. Delay 30s, check flow switch. 3. Check oil pre-heat. 4. Check water temp. 5. Check restart delay. 6. Start 1# fan, delay 3s. 7. Start 1# compressor. 8. Check water temp. 9. Check restart delay. 10. Start 2# fan, delay 3s. 11. Start 2# compressor. 12. Repeat for additional modules.
evidence_quote:
步序 制  冷
1 开水泵
2 延时 30s ，检测流量开关
3 检查油预热时间条件是否满足
4 检测水温
5 检测再启动延时时间
6 开1#风机，延时 3s
7 开1#压缩机
8 检测水温
9 检测再启动延时时间
10 开2#风机，延时 3s
11 开2#压缩机
12 模块内开关按 5-11

title: Heating Mode Start Sequence
summary: Heating start sequence: 1. Start water pump. 2. Delay 30s, check flow switch. 3. Check oil pre-heat. 4. Check water temp (electric heater decision). 5. Check restart delay. 6. Start 1# fan, delay 3s. 7. Start 1# compressor, delay 3s, open 4-way valve 1. 8. Check water temp. 9. Check restart delay. 10. Start 2# fan, delay 3s. 11. Start 2# compressor, delay 3s, open 4-way valve 2. 12. Repeat for additional modules.
evidence_quote:
步序 制  热
1 开水泵
2 延时 30s，检测流量开关
3 检查油预热时间条件是否满足
4 检测水温（电加热开启判断）
5 检测再启动延时时间
6 开1#风机，延时 3s
7 开1#压缩机，延时 3秒开四通阀 1
8 检测水温
9 检测再启动延时时间
10 开2#风机，延时 3s
11 开2#压缩机，延时 3秒开四通阀 2
12 模块内开关按 5-11.

title: Cooling Mode Stop Sequence
summary: Cooling stop sequence: 1. Stop 1# compressor. 2. Delay 3s. 3. Stop 1# fan. 4. Delay 1s. 5. Stop 2# compressor. 6. Delay 3s. 7. Stop 2# fan. 8. Delay 60s. 9. Stop water pump. 10. Stop complete.
evidence_quote:
步序 制  冷
1 停1#压缩机
2 延时 3s
3 停1#风机
4 延时 1s
5 停2#压缩机
6 延时 3s
7 停2#风机
8 延时 60s
9 停水泵
10 关机结束

title: Heating Mode Stop Sequence
summary: Heating stop sequence: 1. Stop 1# compressor. 2. Delay 3s. 3. Stop 1# fan. 4. Delay 1s. 5. Stop 2# compressor. 6. Delay 3s. 7. Stop 2# fan. 8. Delay 60s. 9. Stop water pump (delay 180s to close 4-way valves). 10. Stop complete.

steps: Stop water pump (delay 180s to close 4-way valves)

evidence_quote:
步序 制  热
1 停1#压缩机
2 延时 3s
3 停1#风机
4 延时 1s
5 停2#压缩机
6 延时 3s
7 停2#风机
8 延时 60s
9 停水泵（延时 180秒关1#,2#四通阀）
10 关机结束

title: Defrost Process Sequence
summary: Defrost process: Start defrost → 4-way valve reverses → Fan stops → Check defrost end conditions (met) → Fan runs → Delay (adjustable) → 4-way valve reverses (restore heating) → Defrost end.
evidence_quote: 除霜开始→四通阀换向→风机停止→判断除霜结束 条件（满足）→风机运行→延时（可调）→四通阀换向（恢复制热）→除霜结束（四通阀换向模式）

title: Defrost Start Conditions
summary: Defrost starts when all conditions are met: 1. (Ambient temp Ta) - (Fin temp Tf) ≥ Td (default 7°C, adjustable 4-20°C). 2. Defrost interval ≥ TM1 (≥ -5°C) or TM2 (< -5°C). 3. Fin temp ≤ -2°C. 4. Ambient temp ≤ 12°C.
evidence_quote:
A、必要条件是（室外温度 Ta）-（翅片温度 Tf）≥Td=7℃（可调 4～20℃）
B、分下列两种条件：
1） 当室外温度≥ -5℃时，除霜周期≥ TM1分钟
2） 当室外温度＜ -5℃时，除霜周期≥ TM2分钟
C、翅片温度≤ -2℃
D、环境温度≤ 12℃
同时满足以上 A、B、C、D四条件，便开始融霜

title: Defrost End Conditions
summary: Defrost ends when any one condition is met: 1. Fin temp ≥ 25°C (adjustable 6-30°C). 2. Defrost time ≥ 300s (adjustable 100-600s). 3. High pressure switch trips. 4. Outlet water temp ≤ 4°C for 10 seconds.
evidence_quote:
条件一： （翅片温度）≥ 25℃（可调 6～30℃）
条件二： （融霜时间）≥ N=300秒（可调 100-600秒）
条件三：高压跳 (高压跳开时不报警、但压缩机停止 )
条件四： 出水温度≤ 4℃且持续 10秒
四者条件之一满足便结束融霜

title: Auxiliary Electric Heater Control
summary: Heater runs when: Ambient temp ≤ 8°C (adj 0-16°C) AND Outlet water temp ≤ 35°C (setpoint). Heater stops when: Ambient temp ≥ 8°C+1°C OR Outlet water temp ≥ 40°C (setpoint). Heater forced on during defrost.
evidence_quote:
辅助电加热运行条件：
Ａ：环境温度≤ 8℃/可调（ 0~16℃）
Ｂ：出水温度≤设定值（ 35℃）
非融霜状态时，同时满足Ａ和Ｂ条件，运行辅助电加热。
辅助电加热停止条件：
Ａ：环境温度≥ 8℃+1℃/可调（ 0~16℃）
Ｂ：出水温度≥设定值（ 40℃）
满足Ａ或Ｂ条件，停止辅助电加热。
注：有系统融霜时，辅助电加热强制启动

title: Anti-Freeze Protection Logic
summary: Anti-freeze logic in standby: 1. If ambient ≥0°C and ≤3°C, run pump 60s, wait 60min. If ambient <0°C, run pump 60s, wait 30min. 2. After pump run, if outlet water ≤3°C, start heat pump. 3. Heat pump runs until outlet water ≥15°C. 4. If outlet water ≤4°C during standby, enter anti-freeze mode.

logic_steps: After pump, if outlet water ≤3°C: Start heat pump
Heat pump runs until outlet water ≥15°C
If outlet water ≤4°C during standby: Enter anti-freeze

evidence_quote:
1、当环境温度高于等于 0℃，≤ 3℃时，起动水泵运转 60秒，停机状态维持 60分钟或当环境温度低于 0℃，起动水泵运转 60秒，停机状态维持 30分钟。
2、水泵运转 60秒后，如果此时出水温度≤ 3℃（可设定） ，则起动热泵运行；若防冻启动水泵运行不满足启动热泵，如出水温度≤ 4℃，则继续保持水泵运行状态；如 5℃≥出水温度＞4℃，则水泵运行 5分钟后停止运行等待下次防冻运行；如出水温度＞ 5℃，则水泵停止运行等待下次防冻运行。
3、热泵至出水温度≥ 15℃（可设定）则停止运行防冻；
4、待机过程中若出水温度感温头检测到水温≤ 4℃（可设定） ，则进入防冻运行模式 2-3。

title: Dual Fan Control Logic
summary: Cooling: Dual fans if ambient ≥ D1 (default 20°C, adj 12-25°C). Single fan if ambient ≤ D1-2°C. Heating: Dual fans if ambient ≤ D2 (default 13°C, adj 5-20°C). Single fan if ambient ≥ D2+2°C. Hysteresis prevents short cycling.
evidence_quote:
1） 制冷时：环境温度  ≥ D1（默认 20 oC）时（ 12-25 oC）双风机运行；环境温度≤ D1-2 oC（18 oC）时，单风机运行；当首次制冷开机时若 D1-2 oC <环境温度 <D1，双风机运行；当开机后环境温度上升或下降经过温度区间 D1-2 oC <环境温度 <D1，风机保持上一个运行数量。
2） 制热时：环境温度  ≤ D2（默认 13 oC）时（ 5-20 oC）双风机运行；环境温度≥ D2+2 oC（15 oC）时，单风机运行；当首次制热开机时若 D2<环境温度 <D2+2 oC，双风机运行；当开机后环境温度上升或下降经过温度区间 D2<环境温度 <D2+2 oC，风机保持上一个运行数量。

title: Compressor Energy Regulation Logic
summary: Energy regulation based on fuzzy control: Loading zone (T > Ts+D), Holding zone (Ts+D ≥ T ≥ Ts), Unloading zone (Ts-0.5 > T > Ts-D), Emergency stop zone (Ts-D ≥ T). Cycle time 90s (adj 10-250s).
evidence_quote:
加载区  T>Ts+D
保持区  Ts+D≥T≥Ts
卸载区  Ts-0.5＞T＞Ts-D
急停区  Ts-D≥T
注：  T——实测回水温度       Ts——设定回水温度         D——动作范围
a) 每次能量调节的周期为 90秒（可调 10-250秒）

title: Fault Code 1: Power Failure
summary: Fault code 1 indicates a power failure (phase loss, phase error). The entire unit stops.
evidence_quote: 1 电源故障  机组全停

title: Fault Code 2: Module Inlet/Outlet Water Temperature Difference Alarm
summary: Fault code 2 indicates a module inlet/outlet water temperature difference alarm. Compressors in this module stop.

structured_payload.action: 本模块压缩机停止运行

evidence_quote: 2 模块进/出水温差报警  本模块压缩机停止运行

title: Fault Code 4: Ambient Temperature Sensor Fault
summary: Fault code 4 indicates an ambient temperature sensor fault. In auto mode, unit stops for protection. Only detected by module 1.

structured_payload.action: 自动模式时，机组停机保护

evidence_quote: 4 环境温度传感器  自动模式时，机组停机保护  仅1#模块检测

summary: Fault code 5 indicates a system inlet water temperature sensor fault. Unit stops for protection. Only detected by module 1.

summary: Fault code 7 indicates an external interlock fault (e.g., pump interlock). Unit stops for protection. Only detected by module 1.
evidence_quote: 7 外部连锁故障  机组停机保护  仅1#模块检测

title: Fault Code 8: Water Flow Switch Fault
summary: Fault code 8 indicates a water flow switch fault. Unit stops for protection. Only detected by module 1.
evidence_quote: 8 水流开关故障  机组停机保护  仅1#模块检测

title: Fault Code 9: 1# Compressor Overload
summary: Fault code 9 indicates a 1# compressor overload. System 1 stops.
evidence_quote: 9 1#压缩机过载  停1#系统

title: Fault Code 10: 1# Fan Overload
summary: Fault code 10 indicates a 1# fan overload. In independent fan mode, system 1 stops. In shared fan mode, systems 1 and 2 stop.

structured_payload.action: 独立风时停 1#系统；共用风时停 1#、2#系统

evidence_quote: 10 1#风机过载  独立风时停 1#系统；共用风时停 1#、2#系统

summary: Fault code 11 indicates module outlet water temperature is too low. Systems 1 and 2 stop.
evidence_quote: 11 本模块出水温度过低  停1#、2#系统

title: Fault Code 12: Module Outlet Water Temperature Too High
summary: Fault code 12 indicates module outlet water temperature is too high. Systems 1 and 2 stop.

title: Fault Code 13: 1# Fin Temperature Sensor Fault
summary: Fault code 13 indicates a 1# fin temperature sensor fault. In heating mode, system 1 stops. In cooling mode, operates with fault.

structured_payload.action: 制热时停 1#系统，制冷时带故障运行

evidence_quote: 13 1#翅片温度传感器  制热时停 1#系统，制冷时带故障运行

summary: Fault code 14 indicates a module outlet water temperature sensor fault. Systems 1 and 2 stop.

summary: Fault code 15 indicates a 1# low pressure alarm. System 1 stops. Locks after 3 faults.

summary: Fault code 17 indicates a 2# compressor overload. System 2 stops.
evidence_quote: 17 2#压缩机过载  停2#系统

summary: Fault code 18 indicates a 2# fan overload. In independent fan mode, system 2 stops. In shared fan mode, it is shielded.

structured_payload.action: 独立风时停 2#系统，共用风时屏蔽。

evidence_quote: 18 2#风机过载  独立风时停 2#系统，共用风时屏蔽。

summary: Fault code 21 indicates a 2# fin temperature sensor fault. In heating mode, system 2 stops. In cooling mode, operates with fault.

evidence_quote: 21 2#翅片温度传感器  制热时停 2#系统，制冷时带故障运行

summary: Fault code 22 indicates a module inlet water temperature sensor fault. Systems 1 and 2 stop.

evidence_quote: 23 2#低压报警  停2#系统 三次故障锁定

title: Module Address Setting via DIP Switch
summary: Module address (1-12) is set using the first 4 bits of DIP switch S1. Specific ON/OFF combinations correspond to module numbers.
evidence_quote:
地址设置表：
S1（1-4）状态  模块号
OFF OFF OFF OFF 一号模块
ON OFF OFF OFF 二号模块
OFF ON OFF OFF 三号模块
ON ON OFF OFF 四号模块
OFF OFF ON OFF 五号模块
ON OFF ON OFF 六号模块
OFF ON ON OFF 七号模块
ON ON ON OFF 八号模块
OFF OFF OFF ON 九号模块
ON OFF OFF ON 十号模块
OFF ON OFF ON 十一号模块
ON ON OFF ON 十二号模块

title: Module Function Setting via DIP Switch
summary: DIP switch S1 bits 5-8 set module functions: BIT5 (shared/independent fan), BIT6 (dual/single fan), BIT7 (unit/module control), BIT8 (single/dual system).

structured_payload.BIT5: Shared fan control (ON) / Independent fan control (OFF)
structured_payload.BIT6: Dual fan control (ON) / Single fan control (OFF)
structured_payload.BIT8: Single system module (ON) / Dual system module (OFF)

evidence_quote:
1） BIT5—当该位设置在 ON位置时，为共用风系统控制，反之则是独立风系统控制
2） IBT6—当该位设置在 ON位置时，为双外风机控制，反之则是单外风机控制
3） IBT7—当该位设置在 ON位置时，为单元机模块控制，反之则是模块机控制（为单元机时，此时机组为单模块控制，单模块控制时，两个系统（ TH3、TH4）出水传感器将不使用）
4） IBT8—当该位设置在 ON位置时，此模块为单系统模块，反之则是双系统模块

title: Communication Terminal Matching Jumper (JP1)
summary: JP1 jumper sets communication terminal matching. For a single main I/O board, short JP1 1-2. For multiple boards, only the last board (no downstream comm cable) should have JP1 1-2 shorted.

structured_payload.setting: Short 1-2 for single board or last board in chain

evidence_quote: JP1：通讯终端匹配跳线； 当机组只有一块主 I/O板时，应将 JP1的1-2短接；当机组有扩展 I/O板时，应将最后一块 I/O板（指没有通讯线连往下的块 I/O板）上的 JP1的1-2短接，中间 I/O板上的 JP1 1 -2不能短接，包括主 I/O板（可将短接冒放在 JP1的 2-3上）。

title: Hardware Test Mode Jumper (JP2)
summary: JP2 jumper selects hardware test mode. Shorting JP2 and powering on causes the module to cycle through testing all 12 relay outputs and 12 input protection interfaces. Must not be shorted after system installation.

structured_payload.warning: Must not be shorted after system installation

evidence_quote: JP2：I/O板硬件测试选择，在模块断电的前提下，将该跳接线短接上电，模块将进入硬件测试模式，此时模块将从左到右依次轮流把继电器打开，在 12个继电器输出测试完之后，将对 12输入保护接口进行测试，如其中哪个保护接口断开，则对应的继电器将处于输出状态，三秒之后，输出全部关闭，重新进入新的一轮测试 。（注意：在系统安装好后，严禁将该跳线短接）

title: Manual Defrost Procedure via Line Controller
summary: To initiate manual defrost in heating mode: Press and hold the defrost key for 5 seconds. The display shows 'Hd'. Use menu +/- to select system, +/- to set defrost time (30-240s). Press confirm to execute, cancel to exit.

structured_payload.trigger: Press and hold defrost key for 5 seconds

evidence_quote: 按下 〈除霜〉 键并持续 5秒，系统以一长响一声后 ，进入手动除霜控制，此时 LCD显示屏上的故障代码显示区将显示 Hd，机组号显示区将显示系统号，时钟显示区将显示手动融霜时间，如想改变手动除霜系统号，可通过 〈菜单 +/-〉键调节，改变融霜时间（ 30-240秒）可通过 〈+/-〉键调节，在确定系统号和融霜时间后按 〈确定〉键，将执行强制融霜运行并退出，如按 〈取消〉 键则退出该功能，不执行强制融霜运行 。

title: Manual Fault Reset via Line Controller
summary: To manually reset a fault, press and hold the clear key on the line controller for 5 seconds.

structured_payload.trigger: Press and hold clear key for 5 seconds

evidence_quote: 清除键：机组在故障时，可进行手动故障复位

title: Accessing Maintainer Parameters
summary: To access maintainer parameters: Press and hold Time+ key, then press and hold Set key for 5 seconds. Enter password 8699. Display shows 'd2' and menu number.

structured_payload.access_method: Press and hold Time+ key, then press and hold Set key for 5 seconds

evidence_quote: 通过组合按键可进入 维护者参数设定 ，具体方法是：先按住 〈时间+〉键再按住 〈设置〉 键并持续5秒，在听到 蜂鸣器确认声后，此时密码符号显示，故障和机组号显示区要求输入一个四位密码（8699）。

title: Accessing Manufacturer Parameters
summary: To access manufacturer parameters: Press and hold Time- key, then press and hold Set key for 5 seconds. Enter password 8612. Display shows 'd3' and menu number.

structured_payload.access_method: Press and hold Time- key, then press and hold Set key for 5 seconds

evidence_quote: 通过组合按键可进入 制造商参数设定 ，具体方法是：先按住 〈时间-〉键再按住 〈设置〉 键并持续5秒，在听到 蜂鸣器确认声后，此时密码符号显示，故障和机组号显示区要求输入一个四位密码（8612）。

title: Accessing Special Function Settings
summary: To access special function settings: Press and hold Menu+ key, then press and hold Set key for 5 seconds. Display shows 'Fu' and menu number.

structured_payload.access_method: Press and hold Menu+ key, then press and hold Set key for 5 seconds

evidence_quote: 通过组合按键可进入 特殊功能设定 ，具体方法是：先按住 〈菜单+〉键再按住 〈设置〉 键并持续5秒，在听到 蜂鸣器确认声后进入此功能。

title: Querying Unit Inlet/Outlet Water Temperature
summary: To query unit inlet/outlet water temperature: Press and hold Menu+ key, then press and hold Browse key for 5 seconds. Display shows 'L1'. Use Menu+/- to select unit, Browse to select compressor icon 1 (outlet) or 2 (inlet).

structured_payload.access_method: Press and hold Menu+ key, then press and hold Browse key for 5 seconds
structured_payload.navigation: Menu+/- for unit, Browse for compressor icon 1 (outlet) or 2 (inlet)

evidence_quote: 先按住〈菜单 +〉键再按住 〈浏览〉键并持续 5秒，在听到蜂鸣器长响一声后进入单元进 /出水温度查询功能， 此时LCD显示屏上的故障代码显示区将显示 L1，机组号显示区将显示机组号，压缩机图标 1表示单元出水温度，压缩机图标 2表示单元回水温度

title: Querying System Fin Temperature
summary: To query system fin temperature: Press and hold Menu- key, then press and hold Browse key for 5 seconds. Display shows 'L2'. Use Menu+/- to select unit, Browse to select system 1 or 2.

structured_payload.access_method: Press and hold Menu- key, then press and hold Browse key for 5 seconds
structured_payload.navigation: Menu+/- for unit, Browse for system 1 or 2

evidence_quote: 先按住〈菜单 -〉键再按住 〈浏览〉 键并持续 5秒，在听到 蜂鸣器长响一声后进入翅片温度查询功能， 此时LCD显示屏上的故障代码显示区将显示 L2，机组号显示区将显示机组号，压缩机图标指示同一机组的系统 1和系统2

title: Fault Code Display on Line Controller
summary: When a fault occurs, the fault code symbol displays along with the specific fault code. If multiple faults occur, they display one after another. The unit number shows which module has the fault.

structured_payload.display_behavior: Fault code symbol and specific code display. Multiple faults cycle. Unit number indicates faulting module.

evidence_quote:
当机组发生任何故 障出现，故 障代码符号将显示，并有具 体的故障代码显示。如果在同一时间不止一个故 障出现，故 障数字将自动地一个一个显示出来。
故障代码显示的同时，机组号将显示发生此故障的机组编号，故障代码和机组号是对应的。
